title: Investigating Internal Representations of Correctness in SONAR Text Autoencoders
description: A capstone writeup on probing whether compressed multilingual representations carry signals for code validity, grammaticality, arithmetic, and chess syntax.

title: Brain enthusiasts in AI Safety
description: A guide for students of cognitive science and neuroscience considering work in AI safety.

title: Mathematical Foundations of Hebbian Natural Abstractions
description: A mathematical framework connecting Hebbian learning and natural abstraction formation.

title: Assessing Artificial Sentience
description: A short essay on the methodological and epistemic difficulty of making claims about AI sentience.
